title: taraxacum magnoligulatum
intro: Taraxacum magnoligulatum, also known as the Mongolian dandelion, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family that is native to parts of Asia. It is a close relative of the common dandelion (Taraxacum officinale) and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum magnoligulatum include its ability to support liver function, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects. Taraxacum magnoligulatum can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote digestive health and alleviate symptoms of fever and cough.
